name: io.github.codespar/mcp-persona
description: MCP server for Persona — modern developer-first identity verification and KYC (inquiries, accounts, reports, cases)

environmentVariables.name: PERSONA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Persona API key. Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <value>'.

environmentVariables.name: PERSONA_API_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: Persona API version pin (sent as 'Persona-Version' header). Defaults to '2023-01-05'.
